title: psilotrichum gloveri
intro: Psilotrichum gloveri, also known as Glover's psilotrichum, is a plant species native to Australia, belonging to the Psilotaceae family, a group of ancient, vascular plants with little or no true leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Psilotrichum gloveri include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its ability to soothe sore throats and coughs. Herbal preparations of Psilotrichum gloveri typically involve making teas or infusions from the leaves or roots, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
